heroHeadline: 6 Billion Connected: ITU Marks Historic Milestone as 2.2 Billion Remain Offline
heroSubtitle: The ITU Global Connectivity Report 2025 confirms 75% of humanity is now online — yet structural gaps persist along income, gender, and rural-urban lines; SpaceX's 7,000-satellite constellation and Amazon Kuiper's commercial launch push LEO broadband competition to a new phase
footerNote: Data sourced from ITU, GSMA, World Bank, A4AI, SpaceX regulatory filings, Amazon, and major international research outlets. Contested figures noted with confidence levels.
